headline: Macy's Beats on Q4 Earnings, Posts Positive Comps Across Nameplates
summary: M registers $7.64B in Q4 sales and posts positive comps across all nameplates, led by Bloomingdale's strong performance.

headline: Lowe's Expands Into Subscription-Based Home Maintenance Services
summary: LOW launches $99 HomeCare plus subscription, blending in-home services with AI-era strategy to boost recurring engagement and customer retention.

headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid TPR and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Tapestry currently trades at $145.79 and has been a dream stock for shareholders. It’s returned 221% since March 2021, more than tripling the S&P 500’s 70.9% gain. The company has also beaten the index over the past six months as its stock price is up 28.7% thanks to its solid quarterly results.
